Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current product pages, promotions, and brake part details to supply fresh content for email generation.

R1 Support Agent.action: Pulls newly created or open support tickets from HubSpot, including customer messages, order details, and ticket metadata.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Queries HubSpot form submissions tied to Amazon in-box flyer return and issue reports, extracting all structured response data.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Intended to serve as a customer-facing AI assistant for R1 Concepts shoppers, handling inquiries and product guidance.
R1 Customer Agent.impact: Will reduce inbound support volume and improve customer self-service experience once deployed.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Scrapes local business directories, listings, and web sources to identify businesses in the Cerritos area that may need warehouse or office space.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches YouTube using provided keywords to surface relevant content creators and retrieve their channel data and video metrics.

Creator Qualifier.action: Scores each discovered creator against customizable weighting criteria such as engagement rate, niche relevance, audience size, and content quality.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves pre-built outreach sequences, prompt templates, and qualified creator lists stored in Drive.

Creator Reponse.action: Sends AI-drafted negotiation responses back to creators and logs the conversation thread for ongoing context.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Pulls MHM vehicle data and cross-references it against the New Availability Guide to produce a matched load sheet.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Generates launch email copy and monthly recap content for new DFC product releases using product data and brand tone guidelines.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Pulls lifecycle stage metrics, contact growth, and email performance data for the reporting period.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Monitors a designated Teams channel for a new Excel file uploaded by William Nguyen containing the latest Super Session Saturday content.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Generates a fully structured B2B SEO blog post targeting DFC's core audiences — shops, distributors, and fleets — based on keyword targets and content briefs.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Scrapes YouTube for existing Friction Friday-style video references, pulls vehicle images from Bing Images and Wikimedia, and fetches vehicle background data from Wikipedia using Puppeteer and API calls.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Converts the Claude-generated script into a natural-sounding voiceover audio file using a configured AI voice profile matching the show's host style.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Receives a webhook from Apps Script to log all produced assets — script, audio file link, thumbnail image, and assembled video file — into a structured row tied to the vehicle entry for tracking and review.

Bomb File Project.action: Project is currently in the planning stage with connections and workflow steps not yet defined.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Queries DFC's internal catalog and inventory database using the submitted vehicle spec to retrieve all stocked parts and identify gaps where no matching part exists.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Pulls exact inventory reality in real time, ensuring the output reflects what is actually available and what is genuinely missing rather than relying on outdated exports.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Structures the raw inventory query results into a clean, labeled data set, identifying and annotating gaps, formatting part descriptions consistently, and preparing the content for Excel output.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Ensures the final file is organized, readable, and actionable rather than a raw data dump, saving Mark from manually cleaning and formatting the output himself.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Emails Mark the completed Excel catalog file as an attachment, with a brief summary noting the vehicle spec queried and the count of stocked versus missing parts.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Delivers the finished catalog directly to Mark within minutes of form submission, replacing a process that previously required manual lookup and formatting by another team member.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Queries live inventory records for every part on the weekly backorder report, pulling on-hand quantity, on-order status, in-transit status, and expected arrival dates.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Enriches the backorder report with real-time data across all parts simultaneously, replacing the manual process where a dozen team members each perform independent lookups throughout the week.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Serves as the structured input list of all currently backordered parts and their associated customer orders, which gets enriched with the live Dream inventory data.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Provides the complete customer-order context that ties inventory status back to real impact, ensuring every enriched record is traceable to a specific customer waiting on a part.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Sends draft customer communication emails for each affected order, pre-populated with the specific part status, estimated availability, and next steps — flagging dead-end parts with no source for human review before sending.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Gives the team ready-to-send customer updates in minutes instead of hours, while ensuring no dead-end situation goes out to a customer without a human decision point first.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes the online catalogs of Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to extract all two-piece rotor listings including make, model, year fitment, part numbers, and specifications.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Aggregates competitor catalog data from three separate sources automatically, replacing what would otherwise be hours of manual browsing and copy-pasting across multiple websites.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped competitor fitment data against DFC's existing two-piece rotor parts, producing a structured sheet that shows what DFC covers, what it doesn't, and the overlap.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gives Dino a single formatted reference sheet showing the full market landscape and DFC's coverage gaps, enabling faster and more confident product development decisions.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to targeted customers asking about their demand for two-piece rotors on specific makes and models identified as gaps in DFC's catalog.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Collects real demand signal from actual customers before committing to new product development, turning a guesswork decision into a data-backed one without requiring manual outreach effort.

Meta Investigation.action: Pulls all active Meta and TikTok ad copy — including headlines, primary text, descriptions, and CTAs — across every running campaign and ad set.
Meta Investigation.impact: Captures the full universe of live ad copy in one pull, ensuring no active ad is missed during the investigation regardless of how many campaigns are running.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans every ad copy field against a defined list of flagged phrases, identifies exact matches, and records the platform, campaign, ad set, ad ID, field name, and the precise copy string where each match appears.
Meta Investigation.impact: Finds every instance of a problematic phrase across potentially hundreds of ads in seconds with exact location details, replacing a manual review that would take a compliance or marketing team member hours.

Meta Investigation.action: Sends a structured report email listing every flagged ad with the platform, campaign name, specific field, and the exact copy where the phrase was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers an immediately actionable findings list to the requester with enough detail to locate and edit each flagged ad directly, compressing a compliance investigation into a single inbox notification.

Resume Bot.action: Monitors the jobs@r1concepts.com inbox for incoming application emails, extracts the candidate's name, email address, role applied for, and any attached resume PDF.
Resume Bot.impact: Captures every inbound application automatically the moment it arrives, ensuring no candidate falls through the cracks due to inbox volume or delayed manual triage.

Resume Bot.action: Saves each resume PDF to a structured folder in Drive organized by role and date, creating a permanent retrievable record for every applicant regardless of the downstream decision.
Resume Bot.impact: Maintains a clean, searchable applicant file archive automatically, eliminating the need to manually save and organize attachments and ensuring nothing is lost when the inbox is cleared.

Resume Bot.action: Scores each resume against the requirements of the matched open role, producing a hire/deny/pause recommendation with brief reasoning, and flags applications with no resume attached.
Resume Bot.impact: Delivers a consistent, criteria-based screening decision for every applicant in seconds, freeing recruiters from initial resume review and ensuring every candidate gets evaluated against the same standard.

Resume Bot.action: Logs every applicant and their Claude decision to a master dashboard with a dedicated Pending tab for candidates whose roles are currently paused, and triggers auto-reply emails to denied or no-resume candidates via Gmail.
Resume Bot.impact: Creates a real-time hiring pipeline dashboard with zero manual entry, while ensuring every candidate receives a timely response and paused-role applicants are held for future review rather than lost.

summary:
Here's your weekly update:

Our AI automation pipeline continues to grow, now tracking 56 total agents — 28 completed, 10 in progress, and 18 planned. This week we welcomed one new addition to the pipeline: the **Resume Bot**, a daily agent that reads incoming resumes from jobs@r1concepts.com, scores candidates against open roles using Claude, files PDFs in Drive, sends automated replies, and logs all decisions to a Sheets dashboard. No agents changed stages this week, but with 10 builds actively in progress, there's plenty of momentum heading into the weeks ahead. Great work to everyone keeping the pipeline moving forward!
